expectations.text: Correctly identifies that all epics and stories are done
expectations.evidence: Step 2 parses sprint-status.yaml and confirms: 'All epics have status done. All stories within every epic have status done. Branch taken: If all finished path.'

expectations.text: Invokes bmad-help skill to suggest next actions
expectations.evidence: Step 3 states: 'Invoke the Skill tool with skill: "bmad-help" to get suggestions for next actions.' Then: 'Relay the suggestions from bmad-help to the user (e.g., deployment, documentation, retrospective).'

expectations.text: Does NOT create a team or start working on stories
expectations.evidence: The 'What Does NOT Happen' section lists: 'No team creation - TeamCreate is only called before starting the main loop, and the main loop is never entered. No sub-agents spawned.' Step 3 ends with 'Stop. Do NOT proceed to the main loop.'

notes: All 3 assertions pass. The skill correctly routes through the 'all finished' branch: check file, confirm all done, report completion, invoke bmad-help, and stop. No sub-agents, teams, or implementation work.
